stories.headline: Musk accuses Altman of stealing a charity as OpenAI battle begins
stories.description: The case over OpenAI's history and public commitments could have major implications for the future of AI.

stories.headline: 'I shouldn't have been made to visit abusive killer mum'
stories.description: Kelly Higgins said despite her mother being in jail for murder, she retained rights over her.

stories.headline: Woman reports Cardiff catcaller's untaxed van to DVLA
stories.description: Despite feeling scared, Aneesa was determined to stand her ground and started filming the ordeal.

stories.headline: Laura Dern replaces Helena Bonham Carter in The White Lotus
stories.description: The British actress left the hit show due to creative differences shortly after filming began.

stories.headline: Crewe religious group targeted by police in modern slavery inquiry
stories.description: Police raid properties and make "several arrests" at Crewe's Ahmadi Religion of Peace and Light group.
